title: [codereview-pass2-security] coap_dtn.c: s_senml_pack and s_dtn_buf not defined with K_MUTEX_DEFINE; static senml_pack and buffer must follow native.c pattern to prevent concurrent modification during encode/respond
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c per Zephyr/native.c. Current locals in deaddrop_get are racy if CoAP callbacks reentrant. Add statics + mutex. Tagged codereview. Pass 2 after chunk 1.
close_reason: Fixed in coap_dtn.c with K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_senml_pack_mutex) and usage of statics + locks. 3 clean passes.
